name: feature-loop-codex
description: Codex-native feature development loop on top of acceptance-gate with installable role-based custom agents, model-aware budget routing, evidence-backed verification, human gates, and no Claude Code workflow scripts. v1.12 adds Pareto carry-forward (P1 delta-scoped staleness reverify, P2 baseline-once, P3 judge-panel memo) — same trust bar, run-log is the only memo. v1.13 adds the CT-S coverage switch: T2/T3 default-on morphological-scan of the AC space at S1, a required contract Coverage section gating Gate 1, and card-rendered coverage evidence — skipping requires a visible descope entry.

interface.shortDescription: Codex-native feature loop with acceptance gates
interface.longDescription: Use Feature Loop Codex to guide a feature from idea through design, acceptance contract, evals, implementation, role-routed custom agents, deduped machine verification, judgment panels, adversarial review, evidence-backed human signoff, and handoff using Codex-native orchestration instead of Claude Code workflow scripts.
defaultPrompt: Run feature-loop-codex for this feature request.
Resume feature-loop-codex for this acceptance slug.
